# Hotwheelz

> Premium die-cast cars and racing tracks — classic muscle, modern supercars, Fast & Furious sagas, and rare limited-edition collectibles.

Hotwheelz is an online store for collectors and enthusiasts. Browse curated collections, manage a wallet to fund purchases, and track orders from your account.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured cars, collections, new arrivals, and the latest drop.
- [Sign in](/signin): Sign in to your Hotwheelz garage.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a Hotwheelz garage account.

## Optional

- [Orders](/orders): Order history (requires sign in).
- [Wallet](/wallet): Manage wallet balance (requires sign in).
- [Profile](/profile): Account profile (requires sign in).
